executive_summary.narrative: This release has a handful of medium and low severity findings spanning application, infrastructure, and runtime domains. None are critical or high severity.

top_risks.title: Outdated requests library
top_risks.impact: Known moderate-severity CVE in a core HTTP library.
top_risks.why_it_matters: Affects every outbound request the backend makes.
top_risks.recommended_action: Upgrade requests to the patched version.

priority_actions.title: Set Content-Security-Policy and Cache-Control headers
priority_actions.rationale: Two related ZAP findings resolved by the same reverse-proxy config change.

release_readiness.rationale: No high or critical findings, but several medium/low issues should be addressed before or shortly after deployment.
conditions: Upgrade requests past the known CVE

assumptions_and_unknowns.impact_on_assessment: Reachability is not collected; prioritization relies on severity and confidence alone.
